zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Strathbogie於大約1290年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，她的父親Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl25歲，母親Margaret Mar21歲。她於1310年之前與Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1317年6月1日在英國蘇格蘭費伏卡里克享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Strathbogie于大约1290年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，她的父亲Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl25岁，母亲Margaret Mar21岁。她于1310年之前与Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1317年6月1日在英国苏格兰費伏卡里克享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Strathbogie was born about 1290, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Mar, was 21. She married Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway before 1310, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 June 1317, in Carrick, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Strathbogie est née environ 1290, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mar, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway avant 1310, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1317, à Carrick, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Strathbogie um 1290 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mar 21. Sie hat vor 1310 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1317 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Carrick, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Strathbogie è nata il circa 1290 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mar, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway prima del 1310, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 giugno 1317, nel Carrick, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Strathbogieが約1290年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Athollは25歳，母Margaret Marは21歳であった。1310年以前にイギリススコットランドでSir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1317年6月1日にイギリススコットランドフィフカーリックで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Strathbogie(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mar(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1310년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 6월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 카릭에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Strathbogie nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mar, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway antes 1310, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1317, em Carrick, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Strathbogie родилась около 1290 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mar, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway перед 1310 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 июня 1317 г. в местности каррикк, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Strathbogie nació aproximadamente 1290, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Mar, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway antes de 1310, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de junio de 1317, en Carrick, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
